name: Gensokyo Disaster
description:
This bot was supposed to go private, but i felt like making it public. It probably won't get any chats at all. But i don't really care. Anyway, it's a little AU of mine inspired by sonic.exe stories and especially Roblox games like Sonic.exe: The Disaster, upcoming Outcome Memories, Trud and (kinda?) forsaken. If bot is buggy...then bruh, look at tokins, for sure it'll have troubles with memory.

Don't expect all characters to fit their canonical personalities and origins. Afterall, I didn't put whole lore of Touhou, KKHTA or Igyoukyo within it. Also, maybe I'll add more about Old Hell.

Survivors: In starting message. But you can be new one. Probably. And yeah, all of them nerfed heavily like in KKHTA and Igyoukyo, Flandre who is canonically stronger than Remilia is basically a dead weight there and can't do anything.

Killers:

KKHTA Koishi.

KKHTA Koakuma

Igyoukyo Marisa Variant / Black Witch

Named her Black Witch due bot having troubles with two Marisas

Angry Parsee

(just Pasee who got tired of her shitass life and started killing everyone after getting dumped by Yuugi).

Seiga if she decided to act upon her wicked urges.

EX-Rumia, though, bound to her vessel of Roomba. So technically just vengeful Rumia.

Metal Utsuho/Furnace. Basically an robotic killer Okuu from alternate universe.

Patchouli, Remilia and Satori, Yuugi and Hong Meiling, Orin are dead.

Lil upd: Renamed Marisa Variant into Black Witch. Added just tiny bit of information about lunarians so i can use my Rei'sen persona.

Lil Koish upd: well, name speaks for itself. A little change of Koisherings.

Lil upd: added hashtags.

HUGE upd: Added Okuu as survivor and Furnace as killer. Added slightly more info abt dead chars.

Lil upd: Added second starting message with free scenario.
creator: Ventilator12
